name: tylo-platform
description: Tylo — premium ride-hailing platform. Real-time dispatch, Stripe Connect payouts, driver verification.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm --workspace @tylo/shared run build && npm --workspace @tylo/server run build && npm --workspace @tylo/web run build
